text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My mission is complete. It's all thanks to your
guidance, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My mission is complete. It's all thanks to your
guidance, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. I indeed felt the effects of my
training.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I will take this as a sample of valid success data. It
will be useful for the next race.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: All for the sake of proving my efforts.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have finished inputting your feedback and
adjusting my goals accordingly.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If you believe I can still improve, then for as long
as I'm with you, I believe so too.
